chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-343 of 2022 (Mst. Hakeema Mirbahar Vs. The State & others) DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For Orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 01-03-2024. Mr. Amanullah G.Malik, advocate for the applicant. Mr. Sundar Khan Chachar advocate for the proposed (absent). Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy Prosecutor General. ******** 1. Over ruled. 2. The applicant alleging death of her son Nadeem Ahmed at the hands of proposed accused by making an application u/s 22 A/B Cr.P.C sought for direction against the police to record her FIR, it was dismissed by learned IInd Additional Sessions Judge/Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Ghotki vide order dated 28-05-2022 mainly for the reasons that the deceased has died on account of train accident and two applications of similar nature have already been disposed of. The allegation in face of it is serious in nature involving death of an innocent person; it requires detailed probe, which could only be undertaken on lodgment of the formal FIR of the incident; consequently the impugned order is set aside with direction to SHO PS “A” Section, Ghotki to record the statement of the applicant for purpose of the FIR and then to proceed with the matter further in accordance with law. The instant Crl. Misc. Application is disposed of accordingly. Judge Nasim/P.A
